description: A Go SDK for Decentralized Identity (DID) management on the HARA blockchain, supporting DID lifecycle, key/claim management, and organization identities.

factory.purpose: Handlers for transaction-based write operations to DID Root and Organization registries.

exported_types.name: Factory
exported_types.purpose: Main struct for sending write transactions to the DID Root and Organization registries.

methods.name: GeneralExecute
methods.description: Executes custom data calls on the registry.

methods.name: CreateDID
methods.description: Initiates the creation of a new DID.

methods.name: UpdateDID
methods.description: Updates a DID's document descriptor URI.

methods.name: DeactivateDID
methods.description: Deactivates an existing DID.

methods.name: ReactivateDID
methods.description: Reactivates a previously deactivated DID.

methods.name: TransferDIDOwner
methods.description: Transfers ownership of a DID to a new address.

methods.name: StoreData
methods.description: Associates specialized binary data with a DID property key.

methods.name: DeleteData
methods.description: Removes associated binary data from a DID property key.

methods.name: AddKey
methods.description: Adds a new public key for authentication or encryption to a DID.

methods.name: RemoveKey
methods.description: Revokes an existing public key from a DID document.

methods.name: AddClaim
methods.description: Registers a new verifiable claim associated with the DID.

methods.name: RemoveClaim
methods.description: Deletes a specific verifiable claim from the registry.

methods.name: CreateOrg
methods.description: Creates a new organization DID entry.

methods.name: AddMember
methods.description: Adds a user DID as a member of an organization.

methods.name: RemoveMember
methods.description: Removes a user DID from an organization membership.

exported_types.name: CreateDIDParam
exported_types.purpose: Input structure for DID creation containing the proposed DID string.

exported_types.name: StoreDataParams
exported_types.purpose: Input structure for attaching data to a DID property key.

exported_types.name: StoreKeyParams
exported_types.purpose: Input structure for registerting new cryptographic keys with a DID.

exported_types.name: StoreClaimParams
exported_types.purpose: Input structure for registering verifiable credentials/claims.

utility_functions.name: NewFactory
utility_functions.description: Standard constructor for the Factory struct.

utility_functions.name: GenerateKeyIdentifier
utility_functions.description: Creates a secure random hex identifier for key assignment.

utility_functions.name: GenerateClaimID
utility_functions.description: Generates a deterministic Keccak-256 hash for claim reference.

exported_constants.name: TypeAddKey
exported_constants.purpose: Code for adding keys to a DID.

exported_constants.name: RoleOwner
exported_constants.purpose: Identifier for the primary owner role in an organization.

exported_constants.name: RoleIssuer
exported_constants.purpose: Identifier for a member authorized to issue claims.

orgstorage.purpose: Provides read-only access to organization registries and membership data.

exported_types.name: OrgStorage
exported_types.purpose: Core struct for querying organization-specific state and membership.

methods.name: IsMember
methods.description: Validates if a DID is currently a member of the organization.

methods.name: GetMember
methods.description: Retrieves detailed membership record for a specific user.

methods.name: GetOrgOwner
methods.description: Retrieves the blockchain address that owns the organization registry.

methods.name: IsOrgActive
methods.description: Query to determine if an organization identity is in good standing.

exported_types.name: OrgMember
exported_types.purpose: Structure representing a member's role and enrollment timestamps.

utility_functions.name: NewOrgStorage
utility_functions.description: Standard constructor for the OrgStorage struct.

rootstorage.purpose: Provides read-only access to the DID root registry and document resolution.

exported_types.name: RootStorage
exported_types.purpose: Core struct for resolving DIDs and reading root registry metadata.

methods.name: ResolveDID
methods.description: Returns a DIDDocument containing status and descriptive URIs.

methods.name: VerifyDIDOwnership
methods.description: Confirms if an address is authorized to manage a specific DID.

methods.name: GetKey
methods.description: Retrieves cryptographic key metadata from the registry.

methods.name: GetClaim
methods.description: Retrieves binary claim data and its associated metadata.

methods.name: GetData
methods.description: Retrieves raw attribute data associated with a key hash.

exported_types.name: DIDDocument
exported_types.purpose: Represents the core resolved identity attributes.

exported_types.name: Key
exported_types.purpose: Represents a public key entry within a DID document.

exported_types.name: Claim
exported_types.purpose: Represents a single verifiable credential/claim record.

utility_functions.name: NewRootStorage
utility_functions.description: Standard constructor for the RootStorage struct.
